infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to upload photos to your gallery.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos for upload.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Photos Upload to access your photos for uploading to your gallery.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Photos Upload to access your camera to take photos for upload.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Photos Upload to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Photos Upload to save photos.
